items.title: Ibrahima Konate on brink of joining managerless Real Madrid after rejecting new Liverpool contract
items.summary: IBRAHIMA KONATE is closing in on a move to Spanish giants Real Madrid. The Liverpool defender is out of contract this summer and was confirmed by the club to be leaving when his deal expires. There was a huge question of where the France international would land after taking his leave from Anfield.
